title: Session 14: Examples of Implicit Differentiation
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview Up to now, we’ve been finding derivatives of functions. Implicit differentiation allows us to determine the rate of change of values that aren’t expressed as functions.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Slope of Tangent to Circle: Direct
Clip 2: Slope of Tangent to Circle: Implicit
Clip 3: Example: y4+xy2-2=0
